interaction_phrase: a group of researchers at the University of Innsbruck
occurrence_sentence: Wallman, Emerson and a group of researchers at the University of Innsbruck identified a method to assess all error rates affecting a quantum computer.

The paper Characterizing large-scale quantum computers via cycle benchmarking appears in Nature Communications. — [University of Waterloo News](https://uwaterloo.ca/news/news/researchers-reach-milestone-quantum-standardization)
